certificate.caveat: No assurance of the minimum strength of generated SSPs (e.g., keys).
certificate.description: The HID/Mercury FIPS Provider for OpenSSL 3 is a secure cryptographic module that enhances the cryptographic capabilities of HID and Mercury intelligent controllers, complying with the FIPS 140-3 standard. It integrates seamlessly with OpenSSL 3 to offer advanced encryption, decryption, hashing, and key management functions, ensuring high performance and robust security. Designed to meet stringent industry requirements, this provider ensures that all cryptographic operations are executed securely and efficiently, making it ideal for applications demanding the highest level of security assurance.
